must_detect.matched_text: Valuation and price: Pre-money valuation PHP 2,800,000,000; subscription price payable 60% at signing and 40% at closing via cashier’s order issued by Coastal Trust Savings & Loans (Surcaya branch, fictional).

Use of proceeds: scaling SarangolaPay and LakbayCard, upgrading risk engines (including a “genetic algorithm” module used for fraud scoring), and expanding merchant acquiring; the Pintados Tigers fan-night promotion is expressly excluded from funding.

Regulatory and disclosure: Closing is subject to approval by the Republic Securities and Exchange Authority (RSEA) and, if listing proceeds, the Metro Philippine Exchange (MPX) pre-listing review; parties acknowledge possession of material non-public information (MNPI) and agree to trading blackouts under Issuer’s Insider Dealing and Disclosure Policy and RSEA guidance.

Confidentiality and MNPI handling: Data rooms to be accessed only via named accounts; contact for notices is Ms. Ina V. Palomar, Corporate Secretary, corpsec@banayandigital.ph; breach of confidentiality or trading on MNPI will trigger termination and a PHP 25,000,000 reverse break fee.

Timeline and long-stop: Signing targeted for 15 August 2026; long-stop date 30 November 2026; closing at Issuer’s San Palayo City office subject to all clearances; employee communications to follow approval of the MIR by RSEA.
